scripts.deploy:pusc: npx hardhat run contracts/deploy/deploy-all.ts --config hardhat.config.cjs --network eniTestnet

scripts.transfer:pusc: npx hardhat run contracts/deploy/transfer-pusc.ts --config hardhat.config.cjs --network eniTestnet
